scripts.build:major: node scripts/incrementVersion.js major && git add package.json && npm run build
scripts.build:minor: node scripts/incrementVersion.js minor && git add package.json && npm run build
scripts.build:patch: node scripts/incrementVersion.js patch && git add package.json && npm run build
scripts.deploy:major: npm run git:checkdiff && npm run build:major && npm run deploy:commit && npm run git:tag && npm run git:push && npm run deploy:gh
scripts.deploy:minor: npm run git:checkdiff && npm run build:minor && npm run deploy:commit && npm run git:tag && npm run git:push && npm run deploy:gh
scripts.deploy:patch: npm run git:checkdiff && npm run build:patch && npm run deploy:commit && npm run git:tag && npm run git:push && npm run deploy:gh
scripts.deploy:commit: git add package.json && git commit -m "[TASK]: bump version"
scripts.git:checkdiff: git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- || (echo 'Error: You have uncommitted changes! Commit them first.' && exit 1)
scripts.git:push: git push origin HEAD && git push origin --tags
